# Page 1^page=1
Daily Family Care Notes & Monitoring Log Goal: quick daily documentation with minimal thinking required. Use checkboxes and short phrases only. Date: _____________ Caregiver: _____________ Sleep Last Night: Good / Fair / Poor Overall Day: Better / Same / Worse Vitals & Breathing O2 Range Heart Rate BP Temp Breathing Quality ________ ________ ________ ________ Easy / Moderate / Hard Symptoms / Monitoring ■ Shortness of breath ■ Wheezing ■ Anxiety ■ Fatigue ■ Productive cough ■ Swelling ■ Confusion ■ Pain flare ■ Good appetite ■ Poor appetite ■ Constipation ■ Nausea Important Medication Notes Last Morphine Time: ______________________________ Last Norco Time: ______________________________ Nebulizers completed? ■ Yes ■ No Prednisone taken? ■ Yes ■ No Blood sugar checked? ■ Yes ■ No Function / Mobility Transfer Status Easy / Moderate / Difficult Bathroom Normal / Trouble / Assistance needed Walking / Standing Better / Same / Worse Mental State Calm / Irritable / Confused / Good spirits Key Notes / Events Red Flags: hard to wake, blue lips, severe confusion, very low oxygen, chest pain, severe breathing struggle.
